description_long: This object is a rectangular medicine box with a predominantly yellow and white color scheme. The front panel features the brand name 'vitasation' and the product type 'SLEEP', along with icons and additional text at the bottom. The side panels are densely covered with printed information, including nutritional values, ingredients, and usage instructions, all in small, legible text. The top of the box is partially open, revealing a folded cardboard flap, typical of pharmaceutical packaging. The box appears to be made of lightweight cardboard, designed to contain a smaller internal medicine container such as a blister pack or bottle. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and suitable for display in pharmacies or urban healthcare settings.
description: A yellow and white rectangular medicine box with detailed printed information and a partially open top flap, designed for pharmaceutical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'vitasation' brand, 'SLEEP' product name, and icons at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view with dense printed information in German, likely product details and instructions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more detailed text, including ingredients and usage instructions.
description_view_3: Side view with nutritional values and ingredients list, as well as the open top flap.
